sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100159" key="sunecorqia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεξ-ορθιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n100159.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">excite together</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φόβῳ</foreign> (s.v.l.) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.998e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
